name: Easy Chicken Breast Ideas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place each chicken breast in a covered casserole dish.
3. Add a slice of ham or prosciutto, followed by a slice of provolone.
4. If desired, add tomato slices under the cheese.
5. Pound each breast flat with a meat mallet.
6. Cover with thin mozzarella slices and sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
7. Place an apple wedge in the center of each chicken breast.
8. Roll up the chicken around the apple wedge and secure with toothpicks.
9. Alternatively, pound the breasts flat and roll them up with pesto, securing with toothpicks.
10. Top the rolls with lemon slices, brown sugar, and a light coating of ketchup.
11. Bake for 35-40 minutes until fully cooked.
